option.name: originalContent
option.value: { "name": "htmlflow.org", "version": "0.0.0", "private": true, "scripts": { "docusaurus": "docusaurus", "start": "docusaurus start", "build": "docusaurus build", "swizzle": "docusaurus swizzle", "deploy": "docusaurus deploy", "clear": "docusaurus clear", "serve": "docusaurus serve", "write-translations": "docusaurus write-translations", "write-heading-ids": "docusaurus write-heading-ids", "typecheck": "tsc", "format": "prettier --write .", "format:check": "prettier --check .", "prepare": "husky" }, "dependencies": { "@docusaurus/core": "3.9.2", "@docusaurus/faster": "^3.9.2", "@docusaurus/preset-classic": "3.9.2", "@mdx-js/react": "^3.0.0", "@radix-ui/react-slot": "1.1.2", "class-variance-authority": "0.7.1", "clsx": "^2.0.0", "lucide-react": "0.487.0", "prism-react-renderer": "^2.3.0", "react": "^19.0.0", "react-dom": "^19.0.0", "react-syntax-highlighter": "^16.1.0", "tailwind-merge": "^3.4.1" }, "devDependencies": { "@docusaurus/module-type-aliases": "3.9.2", "@docusaurus/tsconfig": "3.9.2", "@docusaurus/types": "3.9.2", "@tailwindcss/postcss": "^4.1.18", "@types/react-syntax-highlighter": "^15.5.13", "husky": "^9.1.7", "lint-staged": "^16.2.7", "postcss": "^8.5.6", "prettier": "^3.8.1", "tailwindcss": "^4.1.18", "typescript": "~5.6.2" }, "browserslist": { "production": [ ">0.5%", "not dead", "not op_mini all" ], "development": [ "last 3 chrome version", "last 3 firefox version", "last 5 safari version" ] }, "lint-staged": { "**/*": "prettier --write --ignore-unknown" }, "engines": { "node": ">=20.0" }, "resolutions": { "serialize-javascript": "7.0.5", "uuid": "14.0.0" } }

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: { "name": "htmlflow.org", "version": "0.0.0", "private": true, "scripts": { "docusaurus": "docusaurus", "start": "docusaurus start", "build": "docusaurus build", "swizzle": "docusaurus swizzle", "deploy": "docusaurus deploy", "clear": "docusaurus clear", "serve": "docusaurus serve", "write-translations": "docusaurus write-translations", "write-heading-ids": "docusaurus write-heading-ids", "typecheck": "tsc", "format": "prettier --write .", "format:check": "prettier --check .", "prepare": "husky" }, "dependencies": { "@docusaurus/core": "3.10.0", "@docusaurus/faster": "3.10.0", "@docusaurus/preset-classic": "3.10.0", "@mdx-js/react": "^3.0.0", "@radix-ui/react-slot": "1.1.2", "class-variance-authority": "0.7.1", "clsx": "^2.0.0", "lucide-react": "0.487.0", "prism-react-renderer": "^2.3.0", "react": "^19.0.0", "react-dom": "^19.0.0", "react-syntax-highlighter": "^16.1.0", "tailwind-merge": "^3.4.1" }, "devDependencies": { "@docusaurus/module-type-aliases": "3.10.0", "@docusaurus/tsconfig": "3.10.0", "@docusaurus/types": "3.10.0", "@tailwindcss/postcss": "^4.1.18", "@types/react-syntax-highlighter": "^15.5.13", "husky": "^9.1.7", "lint-staged": "^16.2.7", "postcss": "^8.5.6", "prettier": "^3.8.1", "tailwindcss": "^4.1.18", "typescript": "~5.6.2" }, "browserslist": { "production": [ ">0.5%", "not dead", "not op_mini all" ], "development": [ "last 3 chrome version", "last 3 firefox version", "last 5 safari version" ] }, "lint-staged": { "**/*": "prettier --write --ignore-unknown" }, "engines": { "node": ">=20.0" }, "resolutions": { "serialize-javascript": "7.0.5", "uuid": "14.0.0" } }
